title: fraxinus montana
intro: Fraxinus montana, also known as the Mountain Ash or White Ash, is a deciduous tree native to the mountains of North America and Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Fraxinus montana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Fraxinus montana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
